mapper.select: SELECT L.LECTURE_NO AS lectureNo, L.LECTURE_NAME AS lectureName, L.PROFESSOR_NAME AS professorName, NVL(AVG(A.TOTAL_SCORE), 0) AS avgScore, COUNT(A.ASSE_NO) AS reviewCount, ROUND(NVL(AVG(A.HOMEWORK), 0)) AS homework, ROUND(NVL(AVG(A.GRADE), 0)) AS grade FROM LECTURE L LEFT JOIN LECTURE_ASSESSMENT A ON L.LECTURE_NO = A.LECTURE_NO GROUP BY L.LECTURE_NO, L.LECTURE_NAME, L.PROFESSOR_NAME ORDER BY L.LECTURE_NO DESC

SELECT L.LECTURE_NO AS lectureNo, L.LECTURE_NAME AS lectureName, L.PROFESSOR_NAME AS professorName, NVL(AVG(A.TOTAL_SCORE), 0) AS avgScore, COUNT(A.ASSE_NO) AS reviewCount, ROUND(NVL(AVG(A.HOMEWORK), 0)) AS homework, ROUND(NVL(AVG(A.GRADE), 0)) AS grade FROM LECTURE L LEFT JOIN LECTURE_ASSESSMENT A ON L.LECTURE_NO = A.LECTURE_NO WHERE L.LECTURE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.PROFESSOR_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' GROUP BY L.LECTURE_NO, L.LECTURE_NAME, L.PROFESSOR_NAME ORDER BY L.LECTURE_NO DESC

SELECT L.LECTURE_NO AS lectureNo, L.LECTURE_NAME AS lectureName, L.PROFESSOR_NAME AS professorName, U.UNI_NAME AS uniName FROM LECTURE L JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON L.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO WHERE L.LECTURE_NO = ${lectureNo}
